title: Kinds of People
text:
Order By
      Default
      
        Title
      
    
  
    
      
      
    










Manager


A person who manages other people


A person who helps a group of people work well together. They plan what work needs to be done, give jobs to people, and make sure everything stays on track.










Principal Investigator


Money-getting for understanding person


I lead a group of different people who work to understand the world or people by looking for new facts. My work is to get money to let us do this, and make sure that we do…












Research Community Manager


World questioning people grouper


I bring together a group of people with shared interest to share ideas and talk. My work is to help build up and further the interest of the group by giving a place to meet…












Research Software Engineer


World Questioning Computer Person


I am a person who writes computer work to help find answers for a question. My work is to build and fix computer work used in studies. I make sure they work and share it…












Scientist


Someone who looks at the world around them and asks questions like, why is it the way it is or how does it work


Person who’s job is to find out new things. They get facts and other things to help them come up with ideas and learn more about one part of the world, like living things…





No matching items

title: Research Software Engineer
text:
World Questioning Computer Person







I am a person who writes computer work to help find answers for a question. My work is to build and fix computer work used in studies. I make sure they work and share it with other people to use.

title: Research Community Manager
text:
World questioning people grouper







I bring together a group of people with shared interest to share ideas and talk. My work is to help build up and further the interest of the group by giving a place to meet and talk. A part of my work is to help by making people feel accepted and want to take part in sharing ideas and facts.

title: Data
text:
Numbers and words that can be used to answer questions

Pieces of things like numbers, words, pictures, or sounds. People work on these pieces to sort them and give them clear ideas, decide things and fix problems.

title: Data
text:
Numbers and words that can be used to answer questions

Pieces of things like numbers, words, pictures, or sounds. People work on these pieces to sort them and give them clear ideas, decide things and fix problems.

title: University
text:
School for students and teachers to learn how to understand and look for new facts

A place where people go after school to learn more and find out new things. It has parts for people who are just starting and parts for people who have gone further. There are teachers and people work to find out new things.

title: University
text:
School for students and teachers to learn how to understand and look for new facts

A place where people go after school to learn more and find out new things. It has parts for people who are just starting and parts for people who have gone further. There are teachers and people work to find out new things.

title: Community
text:
Group of people who have a shared interest or want or have something the same

A group of people who share things like where they live, what they like, or who they are. They often know each other, help each other, and feel like they are part of the same group.

title: Community
text:
Group of people who have a shared interest or want or have something the same

A group of people who share things like where they live, what they like, or who they are. They often know each other, help each other, and feel like they are part of the same group.

title: Collaborations Workshop
text:
Lots of different people working together meeting

An often exciting and sometimes fun meeting bringing many different people to have interesting conversations to change the world and themselves

title: Collaborations Workshop
text:

title: Glossary
text:
C
  
  
  
    Collaborations Workshop
    
  
    Community
    
  
  

  D
  
  
  
    Data
    
  
  

  M
  
  
  
    Manager
    A person who helps a group of people work well together. They plan what work needs to be done, give jobs to people, and make sure everything stays on track.
  
  

  P
  
  
  
    Principal Investigator
    I lead a group of different people who work to understand the world or people by looking for new facts. My work is to get money to let us do this, and make sure that we do it in a good way so that others can learn from it.
  
  

  R
  
  
  
    Research
    
  
    Research Community Manager
    I bring together a group of people with shared interest to share ideas and talk. My work is to help build up and further the interest of the group by giving a place to meet and talk. A part of my work is to help by making people feel accepted and want to take part in sharing ideas and facts.
  
    Research Institution
    
  
    Research Software Engineer
    I am a person who writes computer work to help find answers for a question. My work is to build and fix computer work used in studies. I make sure they work and share it with other people to use.
  
  

  S
  
  
  
    Scientist
    Person who's job is to find out new things. They get facts and other things to help them come up with ideas and learn more about one part of the world, like living things, what things are made of, or how things move. They work to understand the world around us, fix problems, and tell other people what they find so everyone can know more.
  
    Software
    
  
  

  U
  
  
  
    University

title: Word Explainer for Wonder-Driven Computer People
Research
text:
Piece of work sharing new facts made from ways to understand

Piece of work sharing new facts made from ways to understand the world

title: Research
text:
Piece of work sharing new facts made from ways to understand

Piece of work sharing new facts made from ways to understand the world

title: Research
section: Research what someone or something does
text:
Research what someone or something does

A way to understand and look for new facts

A planned way of looking into something to find out new things, check if ideas are right, or learn more about it. It means getting facts, writing them down, and working through them so they can help people know what to do. This kind of work can be done to learn new ideas, or to help fix real problems in the world

title: Research Institution
text:
A place where people work to understand more about the world

A place where people work to understand more about the world (and look for new facts)

title: Research Institution
text:
A place where people work to understand more about the world

A place where people work to understand more about the world (and look for new facts)

title: Software
text:
Written steps to control a computer wrapped together

Steps that tell a computer what to do and how to do it. Includes all the sets of steps a computer uses, like the main set of steps that runs the computer and other sets of steps people use to do different jobs.

title: Software
text:

Steps that tell a computer what to do and how to do it. Includes all the sets of steps a computer uses, like the main set of steps that runs the computer and other sets of steps people use to do different jobs.

title: Principal Investigator
text:
Money-getting for understanding person







I lead a group of different people who work to understand the world or people by looking for new facts. My work is to get money to let us do this, and make sure that we do it in a good way so that others can learn from it.

title: Manager
section: A person who manages other people
text:
A person who manages other people







A person who helps a group of people work well together. They plan what work needs to be done, give jobs to people, and make sure everything stays on track.

title: Scientist
section: Someone who looks at the world around them and asks questions like, why is it the way it is or how does it work
text:
Someone who looks at the world around them and asks questions like, why is it the way it is or how does it work







Person who’s job is to find out new things. They get facts and other things to help them come up with ideas and learn more about one part of the world, like living things, what things are made of, or how things move. They work to understand the world around us, fix problems, and tell other people what they find so everyone can know more.
